narrative:
Precinct Union Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 824 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
